section_321.notes: T86 de minimis exemption for Chinese-origin packages under review. Multiple bills proposed to lower or eliminate the $800 threshold.

china_tariffs.notes: 301 tariffs remain in place. Proposed legislation may revoke de minimis for Chinese goods, imposing 30% ad valorem or $25/package flat rate.

eu_tariffs.notes: EU IOSS VAT applies to all imports ≤€150. No immediate changes expected.
